title: trifolium filiforme var. dubium
intro: Trifolium filiforme var. dubium, also known as the slender or variable bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for digestive issues, including diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium filiforme var. dubium include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reduce inflammation, and support immune system function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
